### 6\. ⛩️ I Ching (Yi Jing)

| Filter | Function |
| --- | --- |
| 64 Hexagrams (same number as HD gates) | Universal code of change. |
| Study yourself as a moving oracle—your gates are **living hexagrams**. | |
| Map your daily energy, archetypes, or creative decisions to trigrams | |

### 7\. 📜 Mythology / Tarot / Narrative Roles

| Filter | Function |
| --- | --- |
| Tarot archetypes → 22 Major Arcana + court cards | |
| Greek, Egyptian, Norse deities = roles to integrate | Use to encode personal myth into characters, rituals, or personas |
| Use the Fool’s Journey, Orpheus myth, or myth cycles as seasonal overlays | |

### 8\. ⚙️ Systems Thinking / Cybernetics / Fractals

| Filter | Function |
| --- | --- |
| Use to observe recursive loops, pattern collapse, feedback dynamics | Ideal for high-concept builders like you |
| Map inner self as **open-ended, self-evolving system** | |
